title: carpinus chingiana
intro: Carpinus chingiana, also known as Ching's hornbeam, is a species of deciduous tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is valued for its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Carpinus chingiana include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving overall cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
